chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2084 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.9330/2019 2. For hearing of main case 07.04.2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for respondent Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector It is jointly submitted that this petition is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2019 PTD 1964, hence, may be disposed of in the terms thereof. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
